titleStmt.title: Lyrical Ballads 1805, volume 2
titleStmt.author: Samuel Taylor Coleridge and William Wordsworth

sourceDesc.p: Edited from several copies of Lyrical Ballads, 1805, including one in the Firestone Library, Princeton University, one in the Wordsworth Library, one in the library of Simon Fraser University and a fourth at the British Library and corrected from copies of the Fourth Edition in Princeton, Vancouver, and the U.K. 1996-97; corrected further from the Houghton Library copy, Harvard, October, 1998

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI-conformant SGML by Bruce Graver and Ronald Tetreault, with significant help from CETH, the STG, and others; encoding upgraded to TEI P5 xml by Laura Mandell, 7/2025.

docTitle.titlePart:
LYRICAL BALLADS,
with
PASTORAL
and other
Poems.
in two volumes.

epigraph.p: Quam nihil ad genium, Papiniane, tuum!

titlePage.docImprint:
LONDON:
printed for longman, hurst, rees, and orme,
By R. Taylor and Co. 38, Shoe-Lane.
1805.
